---
title: "Análisis de Microbioma Intestinal en Esclerosis Múltiple"
subtitle: "Pipeline DADA2 — Informe de Resultados"
date: "2026-03-23_00-39"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    toc_float:
      collapsed: false
      smooth_scroll: true
    number_sections: true
    df_print: paged
    fig_width: 9
    fig_height: 5
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.align = "center")
library(dada2)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(reshape2)
```

---

```{r cargar-rds}
seqtab_path  <- "OUTPUT/RDS/seqtab.Rds"
sinquim_path <- "OUTPUT/RDS/tabSinQuim.Rds"

seqtab_ok  <- file.exists(seqtab_path)
sinquim_ok <- file.exists(sinquim_path)

if (seqtab_ok)  seqtab     <- readRDS(seqtab_path)
if (sinquim_ok) tabSinQuim <- readRDS(sinquim_path)

taxa_files <- list.files("OUTPUT/RDS", pattern = "\\.Rds$", full.names = TRUE)
taxa_files <- taxa_files[!grepl("seqtab|tabSinQuim|union|errores", taxa_files)]
taxa_ok    <- length(taxa_files) > 0
if (taxa_ok) taxa <- readRDS(taxa_files[1])
```

---

### Tabla de Secuencias

#### Dimensiones

Dimensiones de la tabla de secuencias antes de eliminar quimeras.

```{r seqtab-dim}
if (seqtab_ok) {
  n_muestras <- nrow(seqtab)
  n_asv      <- ncol(seqtab)
  df_dim <- data.frame(
    Muestras     = n_muestras,
    "ASVs unicos" = n_asv,
    check.names  = FALSE
  )
  kable(df_dim) %>%
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
} else {
  cat("`seqtab.Rds` no encontrado. Ejecuta primero `procesarSecuencias()`.")
}
```

#### Distribución de longitudes de amplicon

```{r longitud-amplicon}
if (seqtab_ok) {
  len_df <- as.data.frame(table(nchar(getSequences(seqtab))))
  colnames(len_df) <- c("Longitud_pb", "Numero_ASVs")
  len_df$Longitud_pb <- as.numeric(as.character(len_df$Longitud_pb))
  if (nrow(len_df) == 1) {
    cat(paste0("Todas las ASVs tienen la misma longitud: **",
               len_df$Longitud_pb, " pb** (", len_df$Numero_ASVs, " ASVs)."))
  } else {
    print(
      ggplot(len_df, aes(x = factor(Longitud_pb), y = Numero_ASVs)) +
        geom_col(fill = "#2c7bb6", color = "white") +
        labs(x = "Longitud (pb)", y = "Numero de ASVs") +
        theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
        theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
    )
  }
}
```

---

### Eliminacion de Quimeras

```{r quimeras}
if (seqtab_ok && sinquim_ok) {
  reads_pre  <- sum(seqtab)
  reads_post <- sum(tabSinQuim)
  asvs_pre   <- ncol(seqtab)
  asvs_post  <- ncol(tabSinQuim)
  pct_reads  <- round(reads_post / reads_pre * 100, 2)
  pct_asvs   <- round(asvs_post  / asvs_pre  * 100, 2)
  df_quim <- data.frame(
    " "            = c("Lecturas totales", "ASVs"),
    "Antes"        = c(format(reads_pre,  big.mark = "."), as.character(asvs_pre)),
    "Despues"      = c(format(reads_post, big.mark = "."), as.character(asvs_post)),
    "% conservado" = c(paste0(pct_reads, " %"), paste0(pct_asvs, " %")),
    check.names    = FALSE
  )
  print(
    kable(df_quim, caption = "Eliminacion de quimeras usando el metodo consensus") %>%
      kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
  )

  # Grafico comparativo
  df_comp <- data.frame(
    Etapa    = c("Antes", "Despues"),
    Lecturas = c(reads_pre, reads_post)
  )
  print(
    ggplot(df_comp, aes(x = Etapa, y = Lecturas, fill = Etapa)) +
      geom_col(width = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
      geom_text(aes(label = format(Lecturas, big.mark = ".")),
                vjust = -0.4, size = 4.5, fontface = "bold") +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("Antes"   = "#d73027",
                                    "Despues" = "#1a9850")) +
      scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12))) +
      labs(x = NULL, y = "Total de lecturas") +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
  )
} else {
  cat("Archivos RDS necesarios no encontrados.")
}
```

---

### Abundancia por Muestra

```{r abundancia-muestra-plot, fig.height=pmax(4, nrow(tabSinQuim)*0.25)}
if (sinquim_ok) {
  reads_sample <- rowSums(tabSinQuim)
  asvs_sample  <- rowSums(tabSinQuim > 0)

  # Tabla
  df_sam <- data.frame(
    Muestra          = names(reads_sample),
    Lecturas_totales = as.integer(reads_sample),
    ASVs_detectados  = as.integer(asvs_sample),
    check.names      = FALSE
  )
  print(
    kable(df_sam, caption = "Lecturas y ASVs por muestra (tabla sin quimeras)") %>%
      kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"), full_width = TRUE) %>%
      scroll_box(height = "350px")
  )

  # Grafico con coord_flip para que los nombres de muestra se lean bien
  n_muestras_plot <- length(reads_sample)
  alto_plot <- max(4, n_muestras_plot * 0.25)
  df_long <- data.frame(
    Muestra = rep(names(reads_sample), 2),
    Metrica = rep(c("Lecturas totales", "ASVs detectados"), each = n_muestras_plot),
    Valor   = c(reads_sample, asvs_sample)
  )
  p <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = reorder(Muestra, Valor), y = Valor, fill = Metrica)) +
    geom_col() +
    coord_flip() +
    facet_wrap(~ Metrica, scales = "free_x") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Lecturas totales" = "#4575b4",
                                  "ASVs detectados"  = "#fdae61")) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Valor") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
  print(p)
}
```

---

### Asignacion Taxonomica

#### Composicion a nivel de Phylum y Genero

```{r taxa-phylum-genero}
if (taxa_ok && sinquim_ok) {
  asvs_abund <- colSums(tabSinQuim)

  # --- Phylum ---
  if ("Phylum" %in% colnames(taxa)) {
    phyla <- taxa[, "Phylum"]
    phyla[is.na(phyla)] <- "Sin asignar"
    phylum_abund <- sort(tapply(asvs_abund, phyla, sum), decreasing = TRUE)
    top_n  <- min(15, length(phylum_abund))
    df_phy <- data.frame(
      Phylum     = names(phylum_abund)[1:top_n],
      Abundancia = as.numeric(phylum_abund)[1:top_n]
    )
    print(
      ggplot(df_phy, aes(x = reorder(Phylum, Abundancia), y = Abundancia, fill = Phylum)) +
        geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
        coord_flip() +
        labs(x = NULL, y = "Suma de lecturas") +
        theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
    )
  }

  # --- Genero ---
  if ("Genus" %in% colnames(taxa)) {
    generos <- taxa[, "Genus"]
    generos[is.na(generos)] <- "Sin asignar"
    genero_abund <- sort(tapply(asvs_abund, generos, sum), decreasing = TRUE)
    top_g  <- min(20, length(genero_abund))
    df_gen <- data.frame(
      Genero     = names(genero_abund)[1:top_g],
      Abundancia = as.numeric(genero_abund)[1:top_g]
    )
    print(
      kable(df_gen, caption = paste0("Top ", top_g, " generos mas abundantes")) %>%
        kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
        scroll_box(height = "350px")
    )
  }
}
```

---

### Tabla de ASVs Completa

```{r tabla-asvs}
if (taxa_ok && sinquim_ok) {
  df_full <- data.frame(
    Abundancia  = colSums(tabSinQuim)[rownames(taxa)],
    taxa,
    check.names = FALSE
  )
  df_full <- df_full[order(df_full$Abundancia, decreasing = TRUE), ]
  df_full <- head(df_full, 50)
  df_full <- cbind(ASV = paste0("ASV", seq_len(nrow(df_full))), df_full)
  rownames(df_full) <- NULL
  kable(df_full,
        caption = "Top 50 ASVs por abundancia total con asignacion taxonomica") %>%
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive"),
                  full_width = TRUE, font_size = 11) %>%
    scroll_box(height = "450px")
}
```

---

*Informe generado automaticamente el 2026-03-23_00-39*
